## Problem and evidence

What problem does this change solve? What evidence or eval demonstrates it?

## Behavior change

What should the agent do differently?

## Tests and evals

- [ ] `make validate` passes
- [ ] Added or updated evals
- [ ] Added or updated unit tests where relevant

## Risk review

- [ ] No credentials, personal data, or confidential client data
- [ ] No guaranteed-outcome claims
- [ ] No spam, fake proof, dark patterns, policy evasion, or unauthorized actions
- [ ] Compatibility or breaking changes documented
